title: Pentagon briefing: Hegseth and Gen. Caine say Hormuz blockade 'as long as it takes'
snippet: Defense Secretary Hegseth and CENTCOM Commander Gen. Caine hold joint Pentagon briefing. Caine provides operational update: 'We have established persistent maritime dominance over the strait.' Hegseth says blockade will last 'as long as it takes' for Iran to negotiate. Confirms Navy has tripled mine-countermeasure assets. No timeline for de-escalation.
tag_reason: Joint Hegseth-Caine briefing is new event. Caine's 'persistent maritime dominance' statement and indefinite blockade timeline are new operational details.
